---
title: reproducible-toolchain
description: Anatomy of a modular toolchain for reproducible bioinformatics workflows
---

<https://ccbr.github.io/reproducible-toolchain/>

[![](./img/toolchain-components-labeled.jpg)](https://ccbr.github.io/reproducible-toolchain/)

## Abstract

{{< include abstract/_bosc-2026.txt >}}

## Template components

<https://github.com/CCBR/CCBR_NextflowTemplate>

![](img/class-diagram.svg)

## Presentations

This project has been presented in a few forums:

- [ISMB Bioinformatics Open Source Conference 2026 (poster)](poster/BOSC-2026.qmd)
- [Reproducibility in Science 2026 (poster)](abstract/reproducibility-2026.qmd)
- [ABCS Technical Workshop 2026 (talk)](slides/abcs-tech-workshop-2026-05.qmd)
